title: Decorative Pavers
description: Paving stones to decorate streets, parks, recreational spaces, etc.
body:
![Decorative pavers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20582684a6df14f6ebca0f227edc6c64d2efdb45.png)

Decorative cobblestones is a minecraft mod that adds a wide variety of cobblestones to decorate your streets, houses etc.

With this mod you will be able to use different types of stone and wood pavers composed of stone, granite, andesite, diorite, deepslate, calcite, tuff, dripstone, cobblestone, red sandstone, sandstone and oak wood blocks, spruce, birch, jungle, acacia, dark oak, crimson, warped and mangrove to create intricate and elegant designs on your builds.

![pavers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f898cdf4f5fe018f9f50b099db14c4531fcdf4a4.png)

![pavers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/618190557f07b4048c3f7f2552e9cff92962ebbb.png)

new colored blocks added, the blocks are diorite rock 26/04/24

![new pavers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaa1fc1a1ea6de5f664462f8679bccde54dfb2b1.png)

**The colored granite blocks are only for creating the colored granite cobblestones, they do not have functionality to be used as a construction block.

The colored granite blocks are crafted on the crafting table, using a granite block and a colored dye, the dyes to use are
white, gray, black, brown, red, yellow, green, blue, magenta, the crafting will give you 5 blocks**

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/072c2cae0b268639cfed2cf480b791c32655fd4b.png)

To obtain the colored paving stones you have to use the stone cutter

Each block gives you 10 different cobblestone designs

To be able to create the cobblestones you only need the stone cutter

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77a850e6247b4352fd708167314e2ec7eea7993a.png)

![crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a554da2b14242fea55bb0cfa5b49f79117233102.png)

To get the double color cobblestone designs you only need the mod blocks of andesite, diorite, calcite, deepslate, stone, dripstone, tuff, granite, sand stone, crimson, warped, dark oak, spruce, jungle, oak, warped, crimson and put them in the stone cutter.
